description_long: This is a classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The stock is a traditional fixed type, extending from the butt to the fore-end, and features a smooth, slightly curved shoulder rest. The receiver and bolt assembly are visible above the trigger guard, with a prominent bolt handle for manual cycling. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights, including a front post and a rear notch, suitable for basic aiming. The magazine is internal, with no detachable box or external magazine visible, and the muzzle is plain with no additional device attached. The overall finish is utilitarian, with a matte wood grain and dark metal components.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden fixed stock, long steel barrel, iron sights, and an internal magazine. The finish is matte wood and dark metal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, long barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the front sight post.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the continuous wooden stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
